---
title: "Faadil Mustun"
---

## About

[Write a short introduction about yourself: who you are, what you work on,
and where you are based. A few sentences is enough.]

[mustun@bio.ens.psl.eu](mailto:mustun@bio.ens.psl.eu) ·
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) ·
[GitHub](https://github.com/fmustun)

## News

- **24/03/2026** — Presented my work to the Neurosection Department Seminar, Institut de Biologie, ENS Paris
- **12/12/2025** — Our paper Dolph2Vec got accepted at the AI for Non-Human Animal Communication workshop @ NeurIPS 2025

## Publications

1. **Mustun, F.**, Coauthor, A. (2026). *[Paper title].* *Venue*.
   [Link](https://example.com)

<!-- Add more entries as you have them. Remove this comment when editing. -->

## Invited talks & presentations

- **[Talk title]** — *Event, Location, Year*
- **[Talk title]** — *Event, Year*

## Education

- **[Degree] in [Field]** — [University], [Year]
- **[Degree] in [Field]** — [University], [Year]
